title: Dioscorea polystachya tablet formulation
abstract: A manufacturing method of Dioscorea polystachya Chinese yam powder tablets with a specified loading of 200-500 mg, the formulation to which the manufacturing method is applicable also allows direct compression manufacturing. The tablets produced have a controlled friability for achieving an optimal disintegration rate for controlled release of a non-hormonal bioactive ingredient to ensure therapeutic benefits.
